name: Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first four ingredients with a beater until well combined.
2. Gradually add the remaining ingredients to the mixture and mix thoroughly.
3. Chill the dough for 6 hours.
4. Roll out the dough on wax paper.
5. Slice into desired shapes using a knife or cookie cutter.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
